_comment: Versioned-pin manifest for az-ai v2.0.6. Install with `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai@2.0.6`. Frozen at v2.0.6 — SHA256 below is the digest of the v2.0.6 GitHub Release artifact (published 2026-04-22) and never changes once filled at tag time. No checkver/autoupdate on versioned manifests by design. v2.0.6 is the clean-lockstep release: verify-version-strings.sh gate 4 green, filenames carry the tag version (no C-1 drift from v2.0.4), `az-ai --version --short` reports '2.0.6' on every RID.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator (pinned to v2.0.6)
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai v2.0.6 (pinned) installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
